description: 1. 82% polyamide, 18% elastane2. In-built inner wear support provided3. Contains elastolefin for maximum durabilityThis single piece swimsuit is perfect for recreational swimmers looking for a getaway from their home and office chores, in the club or in the cool neighbourhood pool. women with that extra spark of adventure can carry it with them on the adventure trips, where you may encounter that welcoming pool of crystal clear water to jump into! Rinse with clean water and leave until dry after use. Store in dry place. A swimsuit is type of clothing made to wear during a water-based activity and water Sports. A comfortable clothing for swimming, water polo, diving, surfing, water boarding and even sun bathing. One can find it in numerous colours, material and design to suit their requirements.
